hypothesis: Enforcing the 'Abrupt Snap' and 'Load-Bearing Joke' constraints directly in the Point structures will improve humor flow.

notes: Test iteration passed check. Changes applied cleanly to constraints.

hypothesis: Adding the 'Humor Pre-Requisite' will ensure jokes are only placed after data points.
changes_made: Added rule requiring operational truth before jokes.
notes: Score increased on Humor Integration.

hypothesis: The 3-to-1 rule will prevent scripts from becoming too joke-heavy and maintain brand lore.
notes: Slight improvement, mainly in Expression Economy.

hypothesis: The 'Joke Audit' constraint will force the humor check directly during writing.
changes_made: Added instruction to delete setups to test if joke is generic.
notes: Significant gain in the Humor Integration criterion.

hypothesis: Preventing soft pivots like 'Just kidding' will enforce the Abrupt Snap.
changes_made: Added explicit ban on 'but seriously' and 'just kidding'.
notes: Enhances the rhythm in the Abrupt Snap.

hypothesis: Humor only works if the audience feels the operational pain first.
notes: Flow score improved.

hypothesis: A constraint to punch up at the industry, never down at the audience.
notes: Score dropped. Reverting. Audience roasts are a key part of Marcus style so this broke the style.

hypothesis: Tying the Point 2 self-deprecation to a failed metric gives it operational weight.
changes_made: Updated self-deprecation constraint to require specific metric context.
notes: Target hit! Procedural Knowledge score increased to maximum.

hypothesis: Enforcing the Abrupt Snap in The Lesson prevents sentimentality.
notes: Prevents the video from ending too softly.

hypothesis: Formatting rule to bold jokes makes auditing easier and more intentional.
changes_made: Required visual formatting for load-bearing jokes.
notes: Helps the writer evaluate the presence of jokes at a glance.

hypothesis: Dark humor hooks must establish operational truth immediately.
notes: Creates a perfect synthesis of humor and operations. 10 iterative experimental steps executed successfully.

hypothesis: Require hard pivot phrases after jokes to enforce Abrupt Snap.

notes: Significant improvement in transition sharpness.

hypothesis: Enforce that the Elephant section roast must target a specific operational failure.

notes: Increases early engagement.

hypothesis: Require the 5-second moment to combine a metric and a metaphor.
notes: Score increased on Expression Economy.

hypothesis: Require a specific self-deprecation format.

hypothesis: Add Backpack rule requiring explicit what I thought vs what did statement.
notes: Tension builds much better.

hypothesis: Explicit constraint: No adjectives describing success/failure, only nouns and data.
